body_txt: Perverts come in different forms; some are children and others are elderly . Some perverts are chivalrous and others are predatory . Some perverts are blatant and open about their perversion, while others are more subtle about it . While many perverts are very much aware of how their actions are considered unacceptable, some commit perverted actions simply because they don't understand that their actions are inappropriate. An Oblivious Pervert is someone who intentionally does perverted things but without perverted intentions. Said actions can include inappropriate touching, walking in on people changing or in the shower, or taking off people's clothes, but their intentions are always non-sexual in nature. The reason why said characters are innocent of the implications of their actions can vary. Characters who fit this trope can include children who are ignorant about sex , people with No Social Skills who don't understand their actions are socially inappropriate, and people with certain types of mental disabilities. Some other examples can include people who were raised in the wild , people from cultures with differing ideas of what's considered sexually inappropriate, and animals. How people respond to these types of characters depends on whether or not they know of their innocence; if said innocence is not known to the victims, then they are likely to naturally assume that the perpetrator was knowingly being lecherous and respond in kind. If they do, then they might either scold the innocent or explain that it's wrong. Sister Trope to Accidental Pervert , the difference being that an Oblivious Pervert intentionally does perverted actions without understanding they are perverted, while an Accidental Pervert does perverted actions by accident and usually understands that their actions are perverted. See also Innocent Bigot , Innocent Swearing , and Innocently Insensitive , for other inappropriate behaviors that people commit out of ignorance, and Innocent Fanservice Girl , in which someone provides Fanservice without meaning to or understanding the implications. Compare Jailbait Mistake in which someone commits an act of pedophilia without intending to. Sometimes has No Sense of Personal Space , No Sense of Privacy and/or is Oblivious to Love . May become victims of a Pervert Revenge Mode . If the other party understands that someone was clueless, it overlaps with Forgiving the Accidental Pervert . This is very common with Chaste Heroes as a source of comedy.
